site.tagline: A people-powered, single-issue campaign building a public mandate for affordable and reliable energy for every Australian household.
site.authorisation: Authorised by Z. Hilton, Affordable Energy Australia, Sydney NSW

hero.sub: Sign the petition. Tell Australia's leaders to put families first — before ideology, before politics, before experiments.

stats.label: Australian households in energy hardship today
Average household energy debt across the country
Electricity price rise in just three years
Households now in long-term energy debt

voices.name: Janelle, 62
voices.quote: I had to choose between heating and my heart medication this winter. I never thought I'd see that day in Australia.

voices.name: Tom, 47
voices.quote: Our power bill tripled. We cut staff hours, then we cut staff. Nobody in Canberra seems to notice the small shops closing.

voices.name: Priya, 34
voices.quote: Two kids, two jobs, and we still get the disconnection notices. I signed because someone has to say enough.

news.head: Grid stability fears mount as wholesale prices spike across NEM
news.summary: AEMO data reveals wholesale spot prices in NSW and Victoria reached new peaks during the Easter cold snap.

news.head: 340,000 households now in energy debt — peak body sounds alarm
news.summary: Energy and Water Ombudsman figures show debt levels at a decade high, with average debt up $200 in twelve months.

news.head: Manufacturers warn of further closures without affordability reset
news.summary: AI Group survey of 600 manufacturers identifies energy as the leading risk to operations through 2027.

news.head: AEA petition surpasses 40,000 signatures in cross-electorate movement
news.summary: Affordable Energy Australia confirms supporter base has grown 240% quarter-on-quarter.

news.head: Pensioners rationing heating as winter bills bite early
news.summary: COTA reports a sharp rise in members reducing heating use, with health concerns mounting.

news.head: AEA names independent advisory panel ahead of 2028 election cycle
news.summary: Five former MPs from a range of backgrounds join the campaign in advisory roles.

team.name: Daniel Mitchell
team.bio: Former federal political organiser. 15 years across NSW and federal campaigns.

team.name: Hannah Reid
team.bio: Ex-press gallery journalist. Built the comms function for two state-level coalitions.

team.name: Dr. Aroha Ngata
team.bio: Energy economist; AEMC alumna. Author of the campaign's benchmark dataset.

team.name: Marcus Chen
team.bio: Doorknock veteran. Designs the electorate-by-electorate playbook.

milestones.title: Founding
milestones.desc: AEA incorporated. Founding board appointed. First 1,000 supporters from a standing start.

milestones.title: Petition crosses 50,000
milestones.desc: Surpass 50,000 signatures across all 151 electorates. Public petition handover scheduled.

milestones.title: MP scorecard published
milestones.desc: Every federal MP scored on their public record. Updated quarterly through 2028.

milestones.title: 200,000 supporters
milestones.desc: Half-target supporter list reached. Field organising scaled in 30 priority electorates.

milestones.title: Election cycle
milestones.desc: Cross-electorate field campaign live in 60 marginal seats. Full transparency of funding and impact.
